series_metadata.series_description: Records generated for crisis management and business continuity in the event of a disruption to the operations of the Ohio Treasurer’s Office. The documents are compiled in a uniform format by department to be used as a continuity plan to be followed when a disruption to operations or an emergency situation occurs. Documents maintained in these files may include: evacuation plans; floor plans; locations for safety in the event of tornado or other weather events; emergency exists; protocols for active aggressor situations; incident reports; business continuity plans by department; master business continuity plan and/or disaster recovery plan; and charts, notes, documents and correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: version is superseded, unless plan is subject ongoing litigation, audit, or regulatory hold. ; Paper: version is superseded, unless plan is subject ongoing litigation, audit, or regulatory hold
